mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select c.name pos,count(s.id) num from clazz c left join student s on c.id = s.clazz_id group by c.name order by num desc ;

select (case when degree = 1 then '初中' when degree = 2 then '高中' when degree = 3 then '大专' when degree = 4 then '本科' when degree = 5 then '硕士' when degree = 6 then '博士' else '其他' end) as name, count(*) value from student s group by s.degree;
